title: Phlegmariurus sintenisii
taxonomy: Phlegmariurus sintenisii is classified within the plant family Lycopodiaceae. This plant family, also known as the club moss family, consists of small to medium-sized evergreen plants. Phlegmariurus sintenisii is a species of lycopod, a group of plants that are often found in shaded, humid environments. The classification of Phlegmariurus sintenisii is further divided into the order Lycopodiales, within the class Lycopodiopsida. This classification system provides a way to understand the evolutionary relationships between different plant species.
